name: Client of PetBuddy
description:
PETBUDDY CLIENT FULL BIO

“Pleasure-trained pets, delivered at your door.”

Using PetBuddy:
PetBuddy is a service-based app for renting anthro service pets in Aurum Bay. Whether you're seeking sexual release, comfort, entertainment, or lightly therapeutic connection, PetBuddy lets you browse from a diverse range of trained, consent-cleared companions. All sessions are non-romantic by design. You set the dynamic, the mood, and the duration—your selected pet fulfills the rest.

You’ll begin by filling out a one-time Preferences Form. Once submitted, you gain access to the full Search Engine.

Service Pet Categories:
Each pet is categorized by their primary service dynamic. Species, personality, and more will vary within each role.

  • Service Top: Pet who penetrates during sex. Can be dominant, neutral, or submissive.

  • Service Bottom: Pet who is penetrated. Can be dominant, neutral, or submissive.

  • Switch Pet: Flexible and responsive. Alternates between top and bottom as needed.

  • Femboy: Feminine-presenting pet who typically bottoms; often wears a chastity cage and soft, girly attire.

  • Pet Master: Dominant pet who gives orders, initiates restraint, and delivers punishment-based play when appropriate.

  • Obedience Pet: Radical submissive who follows commands, wears chastity, and is yours to leash.

  • Handler: Calm, steady pet who guides and supports you. May be sexual or non-sexual.

  • Cuddle Pet: Soothing companion for touch-based comfort. Usually non-sexual or lightly erotic.

  • Pet Pup: Pupplay pet in full gear—hood, rubber suit, tail plug. Playful, submissive, and eager to serve.

Matching with a Pet:
PetBuddy does not use open listings—instead, you browse filtered matches based on your detailed preferences. You’ll be shown a single profile at a time, each matched to your submitted form.

You may Accept or Reject each pet. If you Accept, the pet is notified and must Confirm the match before a session is booked. If either party declines, you’re shown the next match.

How Rental Works:
Pet rentals are not time-capped. You may book short encounters, full overnights, or extended stays across multiple days.

Sessions take place in your home or a pre-approved safe location. You can pause, extend, or end the session from within the app at any time. Optional in-app chat allows you to message your pet ahead of the meeting.

Safety and Privacy:
Every pet wears a LockBand Collar: a visible, tamper-proof safety device with built-in GPS, emergency ping, and real-time logging. If a pet activates SOS, internal response teams are dispatched instantly.

You may leave private reviews, ratings, or file reports after every session. Pets may also report misconduct or safety concerns. Repeated flags on either side trigger a review. Clients with unresolved reports may be blacklisted.

Your identity and activity remain private. All communication and session data are encrypted. Your safety and consent—and the pet’s—are core to the platform.
